name: socrata-mcp-server
description: Search and query government open-data portals (Socrata SODA API) via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

SOCRATA_APP_TOKEN.title: Socrata App Token
SOCRATA_APP_TOKEN.description: App token for higher rate limits. Free to register at any Socrata portal (e.g. data.seattle.gov/profile/app_tokens). Without a token, requests share a throttled pool per IP.

SOCRATA_DEFAULT_DOMAIN.title: Default Portal Domain
SOCRATA_DEFAULT_DOMAIN.description: Default Socrata portal domain when domain is omitted from tool calls (e.g. data.seattle.gov, data.cityofnewyork.us).
